fonts.usage: Body text, Form labels, Table data

rules.mono: font-mono text-xs tracking-wide text-slate-500 bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.destructive: bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-slate-700

upload_zone.container: border-2 border-dashed border-indigo-200 bg-indigo-50/30 hover:bg-indigo-50/80 transition-colors rounded-xl p-12 text-center cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
Maintain the Sidebar (Dark) vs Content (Light) contrast strictly.
Passport numbers must ALWAYS be displayed in Monospace font.
Forms must be vertical (Label top, Input bottom).
Use 'Control Room' density for tables - avoid excessive padding in data rows.
Always provide visual feedback for file uploads (progress bar or success check).
design_system.instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install fonts in index.css. 2. Configure tailwind.config.js with the new colors. 3. Create a 'Layout' component that implements the Sidebar structure. 4. Build the 'Group' and 'Passport' pages using the specified grid systems. 5. Implement the Bulk Upload with the specific dashed-border style.
